steps.title: Identify the exponential form
steps.content: The equation $d = 5640 \times (1.9)^t$ is an exponential function with the standard form $d = a \times b^t$. Here, the coefficient $a = 5640$ and the growth factor $b = 1.9$. In exponential functions, the coefficient represents the initial value when the exponent equals zero.

steps.title: Evaluate at t = 0 to find the initial value
steps.content:
Since $t$ represents years after 2010, when $t = 0$ we are at the year 2010. Substituting $t = 0$:
$$d = 5640 \times (1.9)^0 = 5640 \times 1 = 5640$$
The value 5,640 terabytes is the estimated data traffic at $t = 0$, which is the year 2010. That matches choice D — D is correct.
